title: New AI image generator BEATS EVERYTHING
summary: A YouTube video reviewing ChatGPT Images 2.0 claims it outperforms competing image generators like Nano Banana across diverse tasks including poster generation, UI design, data visualization, and spatial reasoning. The review demonstrates the tool's capabilities across 32 test cases and discusses usage specifications.
